case_title: CACH LLC VS. QUOC H. DUONG et al

docket_entries.description: RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH LLC AS TO DEFENDANT DUONG, QUOC H.

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $285.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT DUONG, QUOC H.
